products.name: Sleepy Panda Squishy
products.description: A chubby, super soft panda squishy with a light vanilla scent. Squeeze it to relax after a long day.

products.name: Strawberry Cake Slice Squishy
products.description: A realistic strawberry cake slice squishy with a sweet strawberry fragrance. Looks almost good enough to eat.

products.name: Fluffy Cloud Bun Squishy
products.description: An extra soft, slow-rising bread bun shaped like a fluffy cloud. Perfect for gentle stress relief.

products.name: Mini Avocado Squishy
products.description: A tiny, cute avocado squishy that's easy to carry around. Great as a bag charm or keychain accessory.

products.name: Galaxy Unicorn Squishy
products.description: A beautifully colored unicorn squishy with a galaxy print design that glows faintly in the dark.
